artifactBrief.artifactThesis: Explore the features, benefits, and market impact of a new dog shampoo through interactive charts and data visualizations
artifactBrief.audience: Consumers interested in dog grooming products
factualAnchors: latest market trends in dog grooming products
company's previous product launches and their success metrics
artifactBrief.jobToBeDone: Understand the product rollout process for new dog shampoo
referenceHints: customer reviews and feedback on similar products

judge.rationale: Candidate meets all requirements with interactive charts and data visualizations.

candidateSummaries.summary: An interactive HTML artifact explaining the product rollout of new dog shampoo through charts and data visualizations for consumers interested in dog grooming products.

judge.rationale: Candidate lacks secondary evidence and sequence browsing, but follows layout recipe.
judge.strongestContradiction: Single chart insufficient for multiple required visualizations.

candidateSummaries.summary: An interactive HTML artifact explaining the product rollout for new dog shampoo with charts about market trends and company success metrics.

judge.rationale: Renderer contract failures keep the first paint from qualifying as primary output.
judge.strongestContradiction: HTML chart SVG regions are unlabeled on first paint.

candidateSummaries.summary: An interactive HTML artifact explaining the product rollout of new dog shampoo with charts and data visualizations.
